title: 10 best herbal tinctures for lower back pain
description: Peppermint tinctures helps with lower back pain because of its potent analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. When applied topically or consumed as a tincture, peppermint's menthol content stimulates blood flow to the affected area, reducing tension and relaxing muscle spasms that can cause chronic lower back pain. Additionally, peppermint's natural cooling sensation helps numb the pain, providing instant relief from discomfort and stiffness. By targeting multiple factors contribut...
